HomePage.title: The Essence of Saffron
HomePage.description: Experience a culinary journey where centuries-old Levantine tradition meets modern luxury. Every dish tells a story of heritage and spice.
HomePage.kitchenDesc: Every ingredient is hand-selected to ensure a premium dining experience that honors our heritage.
HomePage.eventDesc: Our bespoke catering services bring the luxury of Chef Aboud Küche to your private venue.

Reservation.introText: Join us for an unforgettable evening where every flavor tells a story. We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance.
Reservation.successMessage: We have received your request. Our team will contact you via phone or email within the next 2 hours to confirm your table.

menuDropdown.freshIngredients: Fresh ingredients prepared daily following traditional recipes from Chef Aboud.

Gallery.subtitle: A Glimpse of Chef Aboud Küche

experienceBridge.menuDesc: Perfect for intimate evenings and daily cravings. Explore our full selection.
experienceBridge.eventsDesc: Our custom buffet calculator helps you plan the perfect feast for your guests.

steps.title: Sourcing the Soul
steps.desc: Hand-picked spices from the Bekaa Valley, arriving weekly to ensure the terpene profiles remain vibrant.

steps.title: The Slow Burn
steps.desc: Our meats are marinated for 48 hours in a signature blend of 12 spices before meeting the oak-wood fire.

steps.title: Artisanal Plating
steps.desc: Every plate is a canvas. We balance texture, temperature, and color to create a multisensory finish.

MenuExplorer.heroDescription: A celebration of Levantine tradition — every dish handcrafted with seasonal ingredients, ancient spice routes, and the warmth of Chef Aboud's kitchen.
MenuExplorer.pairingHintProtein: A full-bodied red such as a Syrah or aged Malbec will stand up beautifully to the richness of this dish.
MenuExplorer.pairingHintLight: A crisp Sauvignon Blanc or sparkling water with a wedge of lemon complements this light selection perfectly.
MenuExplorer.footerTagline: Authentic Levantine cuisine crafted with heritage ingredients and the spirit of generous hospitality.
MenuExplorer.itemS1Desc: Stone-ground chickpeas blended with aged tahini, fresh lemon, and a drizzle of cold-pressed olive oil. Finished with smoked paprika and hand-picked parsley.
MenuExplorer.itemS2Desc: Freshly chopped flat-leaf parsley, heirloom tomatoes, and bulgur wheat, tossed in lemon and extra virgin olive oil. Prepared fresh each morning.
MenuExplorer.itemS3Desc: Garden vegetables, crisp sumac-dusted flatbread chips, pomegranate seeds, and fresh mint in a tangy pomegranate molasses dressing.
MenuExplorer.itemP1Desc: Layers of hand-kneaded bulgur and minced lamb, baked in the tray with pine nuts, caramelised onions, and a warming spice blend of seven baharat.
MenuExplorer.itemP2Desc: Thick-cut Cypriot halloumi grilled over charcoal, served with warm flatbread, roasted vegetables, and herb-infused olive oil.
MenuExplorer.itemP3Desc: Slow-marinated chicken thighs with sumac, cardamom and garlic, carved fresh off the rotisserie. Served with tahini, pickles, and toum.
MenuExplorer.itemW1Desc: Hand-shaped green herb falafel, fried golden, wrapped in fresh saj bread with pickled turnips, tahini sauce and shredded cabbage.
MenuExplorer.itemW2Desc: Rotisserie chicken, garlic toum, tomato, pickles, and pomegranate sauce rolled tight in freshly baked Levantine flatbread.
MenuExplorer.itemW3Desc: Spiced minced lamb pressed inside flatbread and griddled until crispy. Served with a cooling cucumber-yoghurt dip.

MenuExplorer.st2Desc: Smoky char-grilled aubergine whipped with tahini, lemon and garlic.

MenuExplorer.st11Desc: Refreshing house lemonade blended with fresh mint.

MenuExplorer.sp11Desc: Finely layered semolina dessert with creamy kishta, refined with aromatic sugar syrup and pistachios — a traditional Syrian sweet with gentle floral notes.

Checkout.fulfillmentTitle: How would you like to receive it?
Checkout.deliveryHint: We deliver and set up at your venue
Checkout.pickupHint: Collect your order from our restaurant
Checkout.pickupNote: We'll confirm the pickup time and address with you after your request.

Catering.title: Buffet
Catering.description: Customize your premium dining experience. Choose your favorite dishes, specify the number of guests, and get an instant estimate.
Catering.disclaimer: Final price may vary based on location and staff.
Catering.heroSubtitle: Design your luxury dining experience. Choose your favorite dishes, specify the number of guests, and get an instant cost estimate.
Catering.offer1Desc: A selection of the finest kebabs and stews for an authentic experience.
Catering.offer2Desc: A wide variety including appetizers, main courses, and traditional desserts.
Catering.offer3Desc: A luxurious dining experience, perfect for upscale events and weddings.
Catering.qualityDesc: We use 100% organic saffron and the finest meats.
Catering.offersSubtitle: All-inclusive packages for every event — everything arranged, nothing to worry about.
Catering.customSubtitle: Choose exactly what you want. Price per person updates automatically.
Catering.offer1LongDesc: The classic Levantine feast is designed for intimate family gatherings. Experience the warmth of tradition with our most popular dishes.
Catering.offer2LongDesc: Elevate your corporate events with our professional catering service. We offer an exclusive selection of Levantine dishes, specially curated for business lunches and formal gatherings.
Catering.offer3LongDesc: Make your special day unforgettable with the grand wedding package. A complete luxury experience featuring our most exclusive recipes, stunning presentation, and a full service team.

itemS1Description.description: Succulent lamb chops served with herb-infused sauce.

itemS2Description.description: A nourishing bowl with quinoa, tofu, and fresh veggies.

itemS3Description.description: Traditional Spanish rice dish with fresh seafood.

tabbouleh.name: Tabbouleh
tabbouleh.desc: A vibrantly fresh salad of finely chopped parsley, ripe tomatoes, and spring onions, tossed with bulgur wheat and dressed in lemon and olive oil. Bright, herbaceous, and quintessentially Levantine.

fattoush.name: Fattoush
fattoush.desc: A refreshing salad of crisp vegetables, tossed with a tangy dressing of lemon juice and olive oil. A true taste of the Levant.

kibbeh.name: Kibbeh Bil Saniyeh
kibbeh.desc: Crispy meatballs filled with bulgur and spices, baked to perfection. A beloved traditional dish with a rich history.

mansaf.name: Mansaf
mansaf.desc: The royal dish of Jordan, featuring tender lamb slow-cooked in a rich, creamy sauce served over aromatic rice.

knafeh.name: Knafeh
knafeh.desc: A delightful Middle Eastern dessert made with layers of phyllo pastry, sweet cheese, and a drizzle of rosewater syrup.

baklava.name: Baklava
baklava.desc: A rich, flaky pastry filled with chopped nuts and sweetened with syrup or honey.

warak_enab.name: Stuffed Vine Leaves
warak_enab.desc: Crisp vine leaves stuffed with a flavorful mixture of rice, herbs, and spices.

baba_ganoush.name: Moutabal (Baba Ganoush)
baba_ganoush.desc: A creamy and flavorful dip made from roasted eggplant, tahini, lemon juice, and garlic.

hummus.name: Silky Hummus
hummus.desc: Chickpeas puréed with premium tahini, lemon juice, and a hint of garlic. Topped with cold-pressed Palestinian olive oil.

Dishes.desc: A generous selection of our signature dishes, perfect for sharing and discovering the flavors of the Levant. Ideal for two people.

shawarma.name: Oak-Smoked Shawarma
shawarma.desc: Thinly sliced prime meat marinated in 12 signature spices, slow-roasted over oak wood for a deep smoky finish.

shawarma_teller.name: Schawarma-Teller Hähnchen
shawarma_teller.desc: Zartes Hähnchenfleisch in unserem 12-Gewürz-Mix mariniert, langsam am Eichenholz gegart und mit frischem Gemüse, Knoblauchsauce und warmem Fladenbrot serviert.

grill_mix.name: Grill-Teller Mix
grill_mix.desc: Ein großzügiger gemischter Grillteller mit Kafta, Shish Taouk und gewürztem Hähnchen – alles über offener Flamme gegrillt, mit Reis, Grillgemüse und Haussaucen.

aboud_special.name: Aboud-Teller Mix
aboud_special.desc: Chef Abouds persönlicher Signaturteller – eine sorgfältig zusammengestellte Auswahl der feinsten Gerichte der Küche mit Schawarma, Falafel und Grillspezialitäten.

falafel_teller.name: Falafel-Teller
falafel_teller.desc: Außen knusprig, innen zart – unser Falafel wird täglich frisch aus eingeweichten Kichererbsen und Kräutern zubereitet, mit Hummus, Taboulé und warmem Brot.

hummus_teller.name: Hummus-Teller
hummus_teller.desc: Seidig-cremiger Hummus mit nativem Olivenöl und Paprika, serviert mit frisch gebackenem Fladenbrot. Ein Klassiker der levantinischen Küche.

halloumi_teller.name: Halloumi-Teller
halloumi_teller.desc: Goldgegrillter Halloumi-Käse mit knuspriger Kruste und weichem Inneren, serviert mit geröstetem Gemüse und einem frischen Kräutersalat.

Product.hummusDesc: Silky-smooth chickpeas blended with tahini, fresh lemon juice, and a hint of garlic — served warm with a generous drizzle of olive oil and dusted with paprika. A cornerstone of the Levantine table.
Product.tabboulehDesc: A vibrantly fresh salad of finely chopped parsley, ripe tomatoes, and spring onions, tossed with bulgur wheat and dressed in lemon and olive oil. Bright, herbaceous, and quintessentially Levantine.
Product.fattoushDesc: A lively salad built on crisp toasted flatbread, garden vegetables, and a tangy pomegranate-sumac dressing. The crunch of the bread against the freshness of mint and radish makes it truly memorable.
Product.shawarmaDesc: Tender chicken marinated for 24 hours in a blend of Shami spices — cinnamon, allspice, and cardamom — then slow-roasted and hand-carved. Served with garlic sauce and warm flatbread.
Product.kibbehDesc: A beloved Shami classic — a crisp shell of fine bulgur and spiced lamb encasing a filling of minced meat, toasted pine nuts, and caramelised onions. Baked golden in the traditional Levantine style.
Product.mansafDesc: The grand dish of the Levant — slow-braised lamb on a bed of saffron rice, generously bathed in jameed, a fermented dried yoghurt sauce with a deep, tangy richness. A dish of celebration.
Product.knafehDesc: Shredded kataifi pastry soaked in rose-water syrup, layered over warm Nabulsi cheese, then crowned with crushed pistachios. Crisp on top, melting within — this is the queen of Levantine desserts.
Product.baklavaDesc: Delicate layers of hand-pulled filo pastry, filled with a fragrant blend of pistachios and walnuts, soaked in a light honey and rose-water syrup. Each piece is a study in contrast — flaky, rich, and gently floral.

About.title: A Legacy of
About.storyPara1: Founded in 2026, Chef Aboud Küche was born from a desire to bridge the gap between ancient Levantine spice routes and the modern European culinary scene.
About.storyPara2: Every thread of saffron we use is hand-harvested from our private estates, ensuring a level of purity that defines every dish we serve.
